---
title: "cleaning survival analysis clinical table"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```
```{r}
# checking the new label that Teng gave me 
df <- read_csv("../data/New cluster labels.csv") |>
  mutate(id = paste0("P", id)) |> 
  full_join(df_main |> select(id = pid, old_modal_diet = modal_diet))

# Tally up the occurrences of each diet category.
label_summary <- df |>
  count(modal_diet, old_modal_diet)

label_summary  
```


```{r}
patient_summary <- read_rds('../data/R09_df_main_for_nutrition_clinical_outcome.RDS')
```
